title: Add session dry-run NDJSON envelope events
goal: Add the next issue #4 JSONL slice: NDJSON event output for dry-run session spawn, attach, and resume envelopes without starting providers or TUI flows.
permissions: Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: NDJSON emits deterministic `start`, `envelope`, and `done` events with the existing safe envelope and no transcript content
Focused e2e, fmt/check, selfdev build, commit and push pass
verificationCommands: jcode-harness session spawn "fixture" --dry-run --ndjson | python3 -c 'import json,sys; [json.loads(line) for line in sys.stdin if line.strip()]'
failureTaxonomy: Invalid JSONL output or pretty JSON mixed into NDJSON
Transcript content leaked in attach/resume envelope events
notes: Keep behavior additive. Do not change existing --json shape. NDJSON should be deterministic and parseable line-by-line.
